content.problemStatement:
Write a program to count down from `60` to `0` using a user-defined step. Use a `for` loop with a negative step value and print the timer message. When the countdown reaches `0` seconds or below, print the desired abortion message.

---

sampleTestCases.output:
T-minus 60 seconds
T-minus 50 seconds
T-minus 40 seconds
T-minus 30 seconds
T-minus 20 seconds
T-minus 10 seconds
T-minus 0 seconds
Launch aborted!

T-minus 60 seconds
T-minus 40 seconds
T-minus 20 seconds
T-minus 0 seconds
Launch aborted!
